DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT GUL FOOD MANAGEMENT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, modified to correct typographical errors, as follows:

Defendant Gul Food Management, Inc.'s demurrer to the third cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress in the complaint filed by plaintiff Diogo Santana is sustained without leave to amend. Mr. Santana fails to allege outrageous conduct, an intent to injure, or facts showing that Gul Food engaged in reckless conduct with the realization that Mr. Santana would suffer emotional injury, nor does it appear that it is reasonably possible for him to do so. (Davidson v. City of Westminister (1982) 32 Cal.3d 197, 209-210.)

The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's tentative ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT GUL FOOD MANAGEMENT, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, modifed to correct typographical errors, as follows:

Defendant Gul Food Management, Inc.'s motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint filed by plaintiff Diogo Santana is granted without leave to amend. Mr. Santana fails to allege ultimate facts showing despicable conduct to support punitive damages based on malice, nor does it appear that it is reasonably possible for him to do at this point in the case. If discovery or factual investigation results in Mr. Santana learning information which supports a request for punitive damages, he may file a motion to amend.

The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's tentative ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
